prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: Find all C++ source files in envoyproxy/envoy that implement dynamic cluster discovery and health checking: the CDS (Cluster Discovery Service) subscription, the cluster manager update logic, the active health check scheduling, and the outlier detection integration.
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the envoy-service-mesh fixture.
